seoTitle: Hamersley vs Hamersley Range — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hamersley and Hamersley Range. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hamersley vs Hamersley Range: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hamersley and Hamersley Range.
heading: Hamersley vs Hamersley Range — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hamersley, Western Australia and Hamersley Range, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hamersley has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Hamersley Range (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hamersley or Hamersley Range safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hamersley has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Hamersley Range scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hamersley scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Hamersley Range scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hamersley or Hamersley Range?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hamersley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
